docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY PEREZ SIENA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF OCT-08-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $65.25 FILED BY CHEVARRIA LILIANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PEREZ SIENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ SIENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA $380.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $408.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PEREZ SIENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA
